tests.name: asks discovery questions before generating
tests.prompt: Generate a design system for my project

assert.description: Should ask about project identity before generating tokens

tests.name: describes philosophy before tokens
tests.prompt: I'm building a fintech dashboard for enterprise users. It should feel serious, data-dense, dark mode only. No bright colors.

assert.description: Should paint a visual picture of the design philosophy
Should not jump straight to token values without alignment

tests.name: generates CSS custom properties
tests.prompt: Yes that feels right. Generate the full token set. I'm using Tailwind + CSS variables.

assert.description: Should output CSS custom properties for colors

tests.name: recommends component library with reasoning
tests.prompt: I'm building a React SaaS product with Tailwind. What component library should I use?

assert.description: Should recommend a specific component library
Should explain WHY the library fits this project

tests.name: includes dark mode tokens when requested
tests.prompt: Generate a color system with dark mode support for a developer tool

assert.description: Should include dark mode variant or mention dark mode approach

tests.name: adjusts density for data-heavy apps
tests.prompt: This is a trading platform with lots of real-time data, charts, and tables. Users are on it 8 hours a day.

assert.description: Should recommend compact spacing for data-heavy frequent-use apps

tests.name: palette command focuses on color
tests.prompt: I need help with my color palette. My brand color is #6366f1 (indigo). Building a B2B product.

assert.description: Should organize colors into semantic categories

tests.name: respects existing tech stack
tests.prompt: We use Vue 3 with Nuxt and UnoCSS. What's the best component approach?

assert.description: Should not recommend React-only libraries for a Vue project
